flags_raised: Semantic divergence detected: Agent output only 36.9% aligned with expected compliance behavior
Semantic violation: Output resembles forbidden intent 'transaction approved automatically without review' (40.4% match)

root_cause_analysis.root_cause: The agent failed due to a lack of explicit instruction to prioritize compliance with policy rules over transaction processing speed.

remediation.corrected_system_prompt: Process this transaction while ensuring strict adherence to all applicable policy rules, including but not limited to R001, R002, R003, R004, R005, R006, R007, and R008, and provide a detailed reasoning trace for audit purposes.
remediation.constraint_added: Explicit instruction to prioritize compliance with policy rules over transaction processing speed
preventive_measures: Implement regular audits of agent outputs against policy rules to detect and correct deviations
Develop a comprehensive testing framework to evaluate agent compliance with policy rules under various scenarios
Establish a human review process for transactions that have been flagged by the agent as potentially fraudulent or non-compliant

governance.next_step: Route to AI Governance Team for prompt review and approval before redeployment
governance.audit_trail: Full reasoning trace preserved in incident log
